name: agent-context
description: Layered AGENTS.md instruction architecture for Codex repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Design layered AGENTS.md instructions for Codex
interface.longDescription: Scaffold, validate, and audit layered Codex instruction architectures with root and nested AGENTS.md files, lightweight supporting docs, and explicit verify/audit follow-through.
defaultPrompt: Design or refactor a Codex instruction architecture using root AGENTS.md, nested AGENTS.md, optional AGENTS.override.md, and lightweight supporting docs.

Analyze this repository, scaffold a minimal Codex instruction architecture with AGENTS.md, nested AGENTS.md where useful, and optional CONTEXT.md, then leave it ready for follow-up verify/audit checks.
Verify AGENTS.md, AGENTS.override.md, CONTEXT.md, and linked docs against the current repository and report broken references, stale commands, or inaccurate claims.
